limitations: No MainRegimeV2 Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis parent-root slots are filled.
The exported rows are a bounded source-backed preflight sample, not a full chronological 95% acceptance gate.
Full source CSVs are 1.05GB and 2.10GB; raw files were not downloaded or committed.
Self-trade mapping is direct order-lifecycle evidence for a wash-trade subtype, but it still needs a full-context gate before acceptance coverage can be claimed.
next_action: If this direct-self-trade lane is pursued, run a full or larger bounded chronological Zenodo DEX gate from raw rows in /tmp, preserving positive self-trades and same-venue non-self controls; otherwise continue acquisition for exact yfinance/Kraken parent-root labels.
objective: Bounded preflight for replayable direct Manipulation rows from real DEX trade data.

source_logic_observed: Repository pipeline filters self trades before SCC-based wash-trade labeling.
Pipeline writes self_trades.csv and trades_labeled.csv when run over full preprocessed data.
This preflight only exports bounded self-trade/non-self direct rows; it does not run the heavy R pipeline.
source.title: Detecting and Quantifying Wash Trading on Decentralized Cryptocurrency Exchanges

targeted_near_miss_candidates.reason: Herding/risk/signal outputs have no requested exact instrument/timeframe parent-root label panel and are generated signals.
Daily NIFTY behavior/macro/fast-state predictions are not exact requested yfinance/Kraken instruments and not Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis source labels.
Synthetic 10-day LOB data has quiet/normal/volatile regimes, not real exact-underlying parent-root labels.
Synthetic anomaly/fraud sequences; no real transactions, no exact requested parent-root labels, and no accepted direct manipulation coverage.
HMM-derived BTCUSD regimes are explicitly forbidden proxy labels.
